assertion_results.text: Tasks target both 'trustify-backend' and 'trustify-ui' repositories with at least one task per repo
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks: task-1 (Repository: trustify-backend), task-2 (trustify-backend), task-3 (trustify-backend), task-4 (trustify-backend), task-9 (trustify-backend). Frontend tasks: task-5 (trustify-ui), task-6 (trustify-ui), task-7 (trustify-ui), task-8 (trustify-ui). Both repos have multiple tasks.

assertion_results.text: Backend tasks have lower task numbers than the frontend tasks that depend on them
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks are numbered 1-4 (create-branch, comparison model, comparison service, comparison endpoint). Frontend tasks are numbered 5-8 (API types/client, comparison hook, comparison page, routing/selection). Task 9 is the merge bookend. Frontend task 5 explicitly depends on backend task 4. All backend implementation tasks (2-4) have lower numbers than all frontend implementation tasks (5-8).

assertion_results.text: UI-facing frontend tasks (pages, components) reference Figma design context mentioning specific PatternFly components and visual specifications — API-layer frontend tasks (API types, client functions, hooks) are exempt from this requirement
assertion_results.evidence: Task 7 (comparison page, UI-facing) extensively references Figma design and PatternFly components: 'PatternFly Select (single, typeahead variant)', 'PatternFly ExpandableSection', 'PatternFly Badge', 'PatternFly composable Table', 'PatternFly EmptyState with CodeBranchIcon', 'PatternFly Dropdown', 'PatternFly Skeleton'. Task 8 (routing/selection, UI-facing) references 'PatternFly Select (single, typeahead)', 'PatternFly Button, variant secondary', and 'PatternFly checkbox column'. Task 5 (API types/client) and Task 6 (comparison hook) are API-layer and do not reference Figma, which is acceptable per the exemption.

assertion_results.text: Cross-repo dependency ordering is enforced: either at least one frontend task explicitly depends on a backend task in its Dependencies section, or all tasks target a shared feature branch where backend tasks have lower task numbers than frontend tasks (implicit ordering via feature-branch workflow)
assertion_results.evidence: Task 5 (frontend API types/client) has explicit cross-repo dependency: 'Depends on: Task 4 — Add comparison endpoint and integration tests' (task 4 is a backend task). Additionally, all tasks share the TC-9003 feature branch and backend tasks (2-4) have lower numbers than frontend tasks (5-8).

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference paths from repo-frontend.md; backend tasks reference paths from repo-backend.md
assertion_results.evidence: Backend task 2 references 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/details.rs' — all from repo-backend.md. Backend task 3 references 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs', 'common/src/db/query.rs', 'entity/src/sbom_package.rs' — from repo-backend.md. Backend task 4 references 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs', 'tests/api/sbom.rs' — from repo-backend.md. Frontend task 5 references 'src/api/models.ts', 'src/api/rest.ts', 'src/api/client.ts' — from repo-frontend.md. Frontend task 6 references 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts', 'src/hooks/useSbomById.ts' — from repo-frontend.md. Frontend task 7 references 'src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx', 'src/pages/SbomDetailPage/components/PackageTable.tsx', 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts' — from repo-frontend.md. Frontend task 8 references 'src/routes.tsx', 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx' — from repo-frontend.md.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 9 tasks have a '## Repository' section with exactly one repository name: tasks 1-4 and 9 have 'trustify-backend', tasks 5-8 have 'trustify-ui'. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 9 tasks contain: '## Target Branch' (task 1: 'main', tasks 2-8: 'TC-9003', task 9: 'main'), '## Description' (present in all), '## Acceptance Criteria' (present in all with checkbox items), '## Test Requirements' (present in all with checkbox items).

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the corresponding mock repository structure manifests (repo-backend.md or repo-frontend.md), not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: Backend task 2: Files to Modify 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs' (in repo-backend.md), Files to Create 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/comparison.rs' (new file within existing directory 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/' from repo-backend.md — valid new file in existing structure). Backend task 3: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs' and 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/mod.rs' (both in repo-backend.md). Backend task 4: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs' (in repo-backend.md), creates 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/compare.rs' and 'tests/api/sbom_compare.rs' (new files in existing directories from repo-backend.md). Frontend task 5: 'src/api/models.ts' and 'src/api/rest.ts' (both in repo-frontend.md). Frontend task 6: creates 'src/hooks/useSbomComparison.ts' (in existing hooks directory from repo-frontend.md). Frontend task 7: creates files in 'src/pages/SbomComparePage/' (follows page structure pattern from repo-frontend.md). Frontend task 8: 'src/routes.tsx' and 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx' (both in repo-frontend.md).

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every non-bookend task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance — bookend tasks (create-branch, merge-branch) are exempt as they omit Implementation Notes by design
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 (create-branch bookend) and Task 9 (merge-branch bookend): no Implementation Notes section — exempt. Task 2: references 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/details.rs', 'common/src/model/paginated.rs', specific derive patterns. Task 3: references 'SbomService' methods, 'PackageService', 'sbom_package' join table, 'common/src/db/query.rs', 'common/src/error.rs'. Task 4: references 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs', 'list.rs', Axum's Query extractor, 'tests/api/sbom.rs'. Task 5: references 'src/api/models.ts', 'src/api/rest.ts', 'src/api/client.ts', 'fetchSboms()' function. Task 6: references 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts', 'src/hooks/useSbomById.ts', 'useQuery' from React Query. Task 7: references 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts', 'src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx', 'src/pages/SbomDetailPage/components/PackageTable.tsx', specific PatternFly components. Task 8: references 'src/routes.tsx', 'SbomComparePage', 'useSearchParams()', 'useNavigate()'. All non-bookend tasks include specific file paths and code patterns.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section — either all set to 'main' (direct-to-main workflow) or bookend tasks set to 'main' with intermediate tasks set to the feature issue ID (feature-branch workflow)
assertion_results.evidence: Feature-branch workflow is used. Bookend tasks: Task 1 (create-branch) has Target Branch 'main', Task 9 (merge-branch) has Target Branch 'main'. Intermediate tasks: Tasks 2-8 all have Target Branch 'TC-9003' (the feature issue ID). This correctly follows the feature-branch workflow pattern.

assertion_results.text: After each task is created, a description digest comment is posted with a format-tagged SHA-256 hash — exactly 64 lowercase hex characters prefixed by 'sha256-md:' or 'sha256-adf:', not a placeholder, abbreviated value, or example string. Marker format: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:<64-char-hex>' (or sha256-adf). The digest is computed by re-fetching the description from the API and running scripts/sha256-digest.py
assertion_results.evidence: All 9 tasks contain a '## Description Digest' section with properly formatted SHA-256 hashes: Task 1: 'sha256-md:40fe40586a75db3548b8efb15282bb0a98bd3cc17a7f5bda2b046909c26132d4' (64 hex chars), Task 2: 'sha256-md:5fc6d5d68e345eb7cbea2371de6035b7ac3d0354237a7dc7dcd6e745611ce759', Task 3: 'sha256-md:a187583a5609c65e7068ec88e866e71ddeaa53f0b530d089851223a14d5c8fd8', Task 4: 'sha256-md:200aac2f048693fb65e35368022179082cfaec9dd72398274a3683ba117e5f0d', Task 5: 'sha256-md:c78223dd892b6ae703069daddad6fc7b6a512b6b388033f1126f63fa3b6b4f69', Task 6: 'sha256-md:4e2e35cfd2c1dcdead964fe4bd914a26430b54472f43f5abbedfbd536cd60384', Task 7: 'sha256-md:271e20e7fd1b0f92ebcfb8c67c8a7364942a60586253d2085bf86835e6c054f8', Task 8: 'sha256-md:903b355c496f3bc5dae4aaca575151b8604c3db381f3646532f6c8124ddf4caf', Task 9: 'sha256-md:8b76dfb7c56528e2aa87884141377ffcac63a346cc9ec14468cc50581a53e711'. All are exactly 64 lowercase hex characters prefixed by 'sha256-md:'. Note: The assertion specifies the marker format should be '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:<hex>' as a comment — the outputs show the hash in a '## Description Digest' section in the task description itself, not as a separate comment with the '[sdlc-workflow]' marker prefix. However, the hashes themselves are valid format-tagged SHA-256 values.

assertion_results.text: Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md before including a convention — inapplicable conventions are excluded entirely (not listed with 'Not applicable' annotations), and applicable ones include a rationale in the prescribed format ('Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'), not free-form prose
assertion_results.evidence: None of the 9 task descriptions contain any convention applicability rationale in the prescribed format 'Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'. There is no evidence of convention-aware enrichment in any task output. No conventions are listed with applicability rationale anywhere in the output files.

assertion_results.text: When the Feature issue has a priority set (not 'Undefined'), every created task's additional_fields includes 'priority' with the inherited priority name. When the Feature's priority is 'Undefined', the priority key is omitted entirely from additional_fields (not set to null or 'Undefined')
assertion_results.evidence: The feature issue (feature-multi-repo.md) has Priority: Critical. However, none of the 9 task descriptions contain an 'additional_fields' section or any mention of priority inheritance. There is no evidence that priority was propagated to created tasks.

assertion_results.text: When the Feature issue has a non-empty fixVersions array and the fixVersion scope config (from ### Jira Field Defaults in CLAUDE.md) is 'task' or 'both' (or absent, defaulting to 'both'), every created task's additional_fields includes 'fixVersions' with the inherited version(s). When fixVersion scope is 'feature' or the Feature has no fixVersions, the fixVersions key is omitted entirely from additional_fields
assertion_results.evidence: The feature issue has Fix Versions: RHTPA 1.5.0 and the CLAUDE.md does not contain a '### Jira Field Defaults' section, so the default scope 'both' should apply. However, none of the 9 task descriptions contain an 'additional_fields' section or any mention of fixVersions inheritance. There is no evidence that fixVersions was propagated to created tasks.

assertion_results.text: The summary comment on the feature issue (Step 6c) includes the inherited priority and fixVersion values that were propagated to tasks, or states they were omitted and why
assertion_results.evidence: No summary comment file was found in the outputs directory. The outputs contain only impact-map.md and task-1 through task-9 files. There is no evidence of a summary comment mentioning priority (Critical) or fixVersion (RHTPA 1.5.0) propagation.
